nodes.name: 巴拉那河
nodes.summary: 巴拉那河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Yellow-chinned spinetail，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Yellow-chinned spinetail
nodes.summary: Yellow-chinned spinetail（Yellow-chinned spinetail，学名 Certhiaxis cinnamomeus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联8个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括沼泽。

nodes.name: 特立尼达岛
nodes.summary: 特立尼达岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联60种鸟类，包括小穴䳍、美洲瘤鸭、Dark-billed cuckoo等60种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 巴拉圭河
nodes.summary: 巴拉圭河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括美洲瘤鸭、Atlantic black-throated trogon、Yellow-chinned spinetail等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: marabinus, Colombia]] The yellow-chinned spinetail (Certhiaxis cinnamomeus) is a passerine bird found in the tropical New World from Trinidad and Colombia south to Argentina and Uruguay

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The yellow-chinned spinetail is found in all contiguous regions of Brazil, except specific parts of the Amazon Basin

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: From the upper Amazon exiting the Andes, it only occurs in the river corridor, then bifurcating up the Madeira River, southwestwards into Bolivia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: From the upper Amazon exiting the Andes, it only occurs in the river corridor, then bifurcating up the Madeira River, southwestwards into Bolivia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: But apart from that region it occurs in most of South America in the area enclosed by – running counterclockwise – the lower Amazon and the Madeira River, the Andes, the Paraguay River and lower Paraná River, and the Atlantic Ocean

links.label: 分布于

links.label: 分布于

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: This species is a common resident breeder in marshes and the edges of mangrove swamps; in general its habitat is open woodland in the vicinity of rivers. The yellow-chinned spinetail feeds on insects and spiders, keeping low and often in the open
